message:
fix: eliminate panicking .unwrap() in Drop implementations

Panics in Drop during stack unwinding cause double-panic → process
abort. Found 4 Drop implementations using Mutex::lock().unwrap():

1. umask/lib.rs: UmaskSaver::drop — SAVED_UMASK.lock().unwrap()
2. promise/spawn.rs: ScopedExecutor::drop — SCOPED_EXECUTOR.lock().unwrap()
3. config/toml_config.rs: ConfigFileOverrideGuard::drop (test-only)
4. config/wasm_config.rs: ConfigFileOverrideGuard::drop (test-only)

All changed to if-let-Ok pattern: silently skip cleanup if the mutex
is poisoned rather than aborting the process. The mutex is only
poisoned if a prior panic occurred while holding it, in which case
the cleanup is best-effort anyway.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
